name: sidebar
title: Sidebar
description: Resizable right panel that hosts any registered view — file browser, git log, terminal, and more.

name: event-log-viewer
title: Inspector
description: Live viewer for raw agent events — user prompts, tool calls, permissions, streaming output. Great for debugging ACP sessions.

name: left-sidebar
title: History
description: Left rail in the chat view listing your past prompts. Click any entry to jump back to that message.

name: recent-agents
title: Recent Chats
description: Cmd+P command palette to instantly switch between your recently-used chats — VSCode style.
